description: Use apache/iceberg-rest-fixture as Iceberg Rest Catalog
on_init: CREATE SECRET (TYPE S3,KEY_ID 'admin',SECRET 'password',ENDPOINT '127.0.0.1:9000',URL_STYLE 'path',USE_SSL 0); ATTACH '' AS my_datalake (TYPE ICEBERG,CLIENT_ID 'admin',CLIENT_SECRET 'password',ENDPOINT 'http://127.0.0.1:8181'); Create schema if not exists my_datalake."{BASE_TEST_NAME}"; Set timezone = 'UTC'
skip_error_messages: Iceberg databases do not support creating sequences
only supported for DuckDB database files
Referenced column "rowid" not found in FROM clause
Iceberg databases do not support creating functions
Iceberg databases do not support creating types
Array type not supported in Iceberg type
non-null DEFAULT values are not supported for <V3 tables
Referenced column "__" not found in FROM clause
There are no UNIQUE/PRIMARY KEY constraints that refer to this table
The specified columns as conflict target are not referenced by a UNIQUE/PRIMARY KEY
Cannot change nullable column to non-nullable

skip_tests.reason: Checks available databases/schemas
Checks that parquet extension is not loaded
Original test does not define ordering
Startup queries provided via on_init failed
Wrong row count due to extra databases/schemas from on_init
DuckDB type is not Iceberg Type  i.e hugeint is stored as decimal(38,0)
DuckDB-Iceberg does not check column constraints
Incompatible transaction support
SIGSEGV / crash / incorrect result - needs manual investigation
ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN with DEFAULT values not fully supported (HTTP 500 or wrong result)
Foreign key constraints not supported in Iceberg
Schema visibility / concurrent schema creation in Iceberg differs from DuckDB
ALTER TABLE SET PARTITIONED BY is supported in Iceberg but DuckDB tests expect failure
Generated columns not supported the same way in Iceberg
Error message differs between DuckDB and Iceberg catalog
Collation support is not the same on Iceberg
Wrong result on OR conditions (likely predicate pushdown / file layout)
View references non-iceberg schema or table by short name
CSV / COPY behavior differs on Iceberg (timestamp_tz, batched_write, rejects)
ATTACH encrypted/unencrypted duckdb db file - not applicable to Iceberg catalog
Parquet write / read differences when storage backed by Iceberg
Cross-test schema 'tpch' collision
Parquet writer / round trip - Iceberg storage type/typeof differences
COPY DATABASE not applicable when target is Iceberg
CREATE TABLE WITH partitions/options - DuckDB syntax not the same on Iceberg
EXPLAIN output differs because storage backend is Iceberg
Stats / memory_usage / transitive filter output reflects iceberg storage
Concurrent commit conflicts during transactional deletes
Wrong result in list functions - file ordering or iceberg list semantics
HUGEINT bounds when exporting parquet through iceberg
EXPORT/IMPORT DATABASE produces statements (e.g. PRAGMA) iceberg cannot handle
extension function error message differs
Generated/virtual columns - Iceberg inserts include virtual columns so binder rejects with fewer values
UTF8 string functions / contains / instr / starts_with return wrong result on iceberg
Variant type / timestamp_ns not supported by iceberg-rest-fixture
Timestamp / date diff/sub/age - wrong result on iceberg
regex_escape operator caching
Out of memory on external join/sort with iceberg-backed tables (parquet read consumes more memory)
rowid column is not exposed on iceberg-backed tables
Copied/Unoptimized statement differs from original result
Wrong result on join / merge / window - iceberg storage ordering
HUGEINT extreme values cast to DECIMAL(38,0) on iceberg
MERGE INTO error message differs
pg_catalog tables / system_functions return different values on iceberg
Pivot / parallel materialization wrong result due to iceberg storage ordering
Time-travel / AT clause - iceberg accepts but DuckDB tests expect failure
SET schema with temp/main where iceberg has no main
DELETE wrong result on iceberg storage
Concurrent commit conflicts (HTTP 409) during transactional appends/inserts
DuckDB checkpoint / many_checkpoints semantics don't apply to Iceberg
DuckDB encryption / external file cache tests not applicable on Iceberg
DuckDB WAL semantics don't apply to Iceberg
DuckDB optimistic_write semantics - iceberg has different commit semantics
Parallel insert order / batch tests - storage ordering differs on iceberg
DuckDB overflow_strings / partial_blocks / nested struct internal storage tests
DuckDB vacuum_partial_deletes - iceberg has no row_groups in the same way
S3 / external_access path access disabled by iceberg config
shutdown_unique_index / multiple_clients - iceberg constraint enforcement
relocate_metadata uses generated columns insert
Large interleaved transactions trigger commit conflicts (HTTP 409)
UPDATE tests where iceberg keeps tables across runs (re-use original_data)
UPDATE / UPSERT - iceberg differences in same-value/non-regular-type/upsert distinct bug
Window tests with iceberg storage differences
Transactions: behavior differs because iceberg has its own transaction semantics
Subquery wrong result / Unoptimized statement differs
information_schema / duckdb_constraints differs on iceberg
Top-N / timezone / topn tests differ
BIGNUM / HUGEINT cast tests fail on iceberg (decimal(38,0) representation)
BLOB / list / nested wrong result on iceberg
Geometry type not supported by iceberg-rest-fixture
List index abort: constraint not enforced on iceberg
Unoptimized/copied statement differs from original on iceberg
ROWID column not supported on iceberg tables
Struct / timestamp_tz / all_types - iceberg type differences
DuckDB storage compression tests (bitpacking/dictionary/dict_fsst/fsst/rle/roaring/alp/alprd/zstd/string) don't apply to Iceberg parquet storage
Out of memory in buffer manager tests (iceberg memory pressure)
DuckDB checkpoint_abort tests - iceberg has no equivalent abort semantics
Concurrent / parallel inter-query tests hang or fail due to Iceberg REST commit conflicts
ART index tests - Iceberg has no secondary indexes, ART-specific tests don't apply
Iceberg catalog is case-sensitive on table names (DuckDB normalizes)
Schema conflict from on_init / cross-test schema collision
ATTACH a duckdb database file or another iceberg database not supported in this fixture
Test references main.<table> or another non-iceberg schema via on_new_connection
Wrong row count - storage layout differences vs duckdb
search_path / current_setting returns different value on iceberg attach
Approximate aggregate produces different ordering depending on storage layout
changing secret manager settings after the secret manager is used is not allowed
